results.title: Historic attractions close as heatwave intensifies
results.description: National Trust sites in Suffolk, including Ickworth House, will be closed on Thursday and Friday as the heatwave across the county intensifies.

results.title: Early look at Virginia Tech's 2026 Week 10 opponent SMU
results.description: The Mustangs notched wins over Clemson, Miami and Louisville in their second season in the ACC to prove they are capable of competing with the league’s best on a weekly basis.

results.title: Japan clears 18 officials to handle economic security info
results.description: The personnel were qualified under the security clearance assessment system based on the law, which was enacted in May 2024.

results.title: New Wichita business aims to bring more affordable housing to Kansas
results.description: Signage at the new Prime Craftsman Homes Wichita location is put up. The company, which began in Tulsa, aims to build more affordable homes.

results.title: Midi Health tackles hormone-driven skin aging with topical menopause line
results.description: US-based virtual clinic, Midi Health, has expanded its prescription skin care line built for hormonal skin changes that start in a woman’s 30s and accelerate through menopause. In the US, over a million women go through menopause each year, signifying a large market opportunity. Midlife hormonal shifts can impact the skin, leading to dryness, thinning, adult acne, and accelerated skin damage.

results.title: Gold ETFs Face Fresh Outflows as Strong Dollar Pressures Bullion Prices
results.description: Gold prices have fallen below 4,000 dollar per ounce for the first time since November 2025 as rising U.S. interest-rate expectations, a stronger dollar, and persistent ETF outflows pressure the bullion market. Major banks have lowered gold forecasts, although continued central bank buying remains a key source of long-term support.

results.title: Kriti Sanon Doesn't Need to Be the Next Deepika — She's Already Kriti
results.description: Kriti Sanon's Cocktail 2 sparked "next Deepika" comparisons, but her 20-film career, business ventures, and global fashion presence tell a different, original story.

results.title: Impact Weather: Risk of thunderstorms for parts of Mass. on Friday
results.description: StormTeam 5 is tracking Impact Weather across Massachusetts on Friday. Early-morning showers will give way to some midday sunshine. There will be a risk of thunderstorms during the afternoon and evening.

results.title: Call 999 if you see wanted man with links to Ashford
results.description: Anyone who sees him should contact police as soon as possible

results.title: Meat Type, Not Quantity, Tied to Cancer Death Risk in Koreans
results.description: A Korean study of 147,562 adults found meat type and sex, not total meat intake, are tied to cancer death risk. Red meat lowered stomach cancer death risk in men, while organ meat raised it in women.

results.title: BIS Raids Another Surat Firm, Seizes 2,265 Electrical Appliances Without ISI Mark
